---
title: "Cell-Cell Communication"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Cell-Cell Communication}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, eval=FALSE}
library(ncfigR)
lr <- readr::read_tsv(system.file("extdata/lr_pairs.tsv", package = "ncfigR"))
p1 <- plot_lr_heatmap(lr)
p2 <- plot_lr_network(lr, top_n = 8)
fig <- compose_nc_figure(list(p1, p2), ncol = 2, title = "Communication")
```
